full_text:
Han Jiang
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Jiangwas born in Jianwei. Widowed when she was twenty, refused to marry. Abducted for a suitor, killed herself. Han Jiang was affiliated with Liu Zhang.
